shortDescription: Modern 2-bedroom townhouse in Howard Park with rooftop terrace and integrated garage.
fullDescription: Welcome to 55 Howard Park Avenue in the vibrant Howard Park neighbourhood. This stylish multi-level townhouse provides the space of a house with the convenience of condo living. The main living area opens onto a spacious combined living and dining area flooded with afternoon sun. The kitchen offers ample counter space, premium fixtures, and a convenient eat-in dining area. Upstairs, 2 bright bedrooms include a primary retreat with ensuite and double closets. Smart-home features, updated plumbing, and a newer roof provide peace of mind for years to come. Transit, cycling infrastructure, and the best of Toronto’s cultural scene are right at your doorstep.
keyFeatures: Close to waterfront trails and cycling paths
Open kitchen with waterfall island and pot lights
